title: GOV-CONVERGE-007-A: retire the legacy canonical creation path (410) + migrate normal tests to process-approved
intent: Follow-up safety net to C2 PR-1 (#182/#185). Retire the remaining normal path for creating canonical geometry WITHOUT process-approval metadata so the process-approved path is the only green-path creator. The legacy HTTP creator POST /api/cam/geometry-authority/references/canonical now returns 410 Gone (route stays mounted for a deliberate migration signal to /references/canonical/process-approved; registers nothing). Normal green-path tests migrate to a process-approved helper/endpoint; only two explicit legacy-transition tests keep the old create_canonical_geometry_reference factory. Warning-not-RED transition behavior is preserved; no authorization anchor, no persistent authenticity lookup, no solver/CAM/export/IBG change. Closes GOV-CONVERGE-007 items 1 and 2; items 3 (warning->RED timing) and 5 (persistent authenticity) stay open, so the umbrella stays OPEN.
behavior_change: yes - legacy POST /references/canonical now returns 410 Gone instead of creating a reference (client-facing API contract change); no reference is registered. The process-approved endpoint and warning-not-RED validation are unchanged; no endpoint-count change (route stays mounted).

diff_articulation.what_changed: (1) geometry_authority_router.py: create_canonical_reference (POST /references/canonical) now raises HTTPException(410) pointing at /references/canonical/process-approved, and no longer imports/calls create_canonical_geometry_reference or registers a reference; the route + CreateCanonicalReferenceRequest stay mounted (OpenAPI + deliberate migration signal, no endpoint-count churn). (2) geometry_authority_reference.py: create_canonical_geometry_reference docstring updated — RETIRED for runtime/API creation, retained only for explicit legacy-transition tests; ratified-status wording (still warning-not-RED). (3) test_geometry_authority_references.py: added _canonical_ref (process-approved green-path fixture, legacy-compatible signature) and _process_approved_canonical_payload (router body); migrated 33 green-path create_canonical_geometry_reference calls + 4 legacy /references/canonical router setup calls to the process-approved helper/endpoint; the old router test now asserts 410 (test_legacy_canonical_endpoint_is_retired, no side-effect registration); only 2 explicit legacy-transition tests keep the legacy factory (test_validate_legacy_canonical_reference_warns_not_red, test_all_factory_functions_enforce_invariants). (4) SPRINTS.md: GOV-CONVERGE-007-A progress — items 1 & 2 CLOSED, items 3 & 5 stay OPEN, umbrella OPEN. (5) this per-PR CBSP21 manifest.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: Before this change a client (or a test fixture) could still create canonical geometry with NO governed process-approval metadata via a normal 200 endpoint and factory, re-opening the exact bypass C2 PR-1 closed at the fabrication layer. Retiring the legacy creator at the API boundary (410) and moving all green-path tests to the process-approved path makes process-approval the only supported canonical creator, materially reducing the blast radius before a later strict-RED decision. Warning-not-RED is deliberately preserved; the strict flip and persistent authenticity remain tracked-open follow-ups.

commands_run: grep create_canonical_geometry_reference( in test_geometry_authority_references.py -> 2 (both explicit legacy-transition tests)
grep bare POST /references/canonical in test file -> 1 (the retirement 410 test only)
py_compile router + reference module + test file -> OK

files.intent: Retire the legacy canonical creator: POST /references/canonical -> 410 Gone pointing at the process-approved endpoint; drop the now-unused create_canonical_geometry_reference import; register nothing.
files.behavior_change: yes - legacy endpoint returns 410 instead of 200; no reference registered; route stays mounted (no endpoint-count change)

files.intent: Docstring-only: mark create_canonical_geometry_reference RETIRED for runtime/API creation, retained only for explicit legacy-transition tests; ratified-status wording.
files.behavior_change: none - docstring only, no model/logic change
verification: pytest tests/cam/ green; no behavior assertions changed

files.intent: Migrate green-path fixtures to process-approved (helper + payload); assert legacy endpoint 410; keep 2 explicit legacy-transition tests on the old factory.
Dev-order handoff for this lane: 410 retirement decision, test-migration plan, decisions/out-of-scope, and the item 3/5 deferrals.
Record GOV-CONVERGE-007-A progress: items 1 & 2 CLOSED (410 retirement + fixture migration); items 3 & 5 stay OPEN; umbrella stays OPEN.
